headline: GoDaddy (GDDY) Is Up 8.1% After Partnering With LegalZoom To Power Integrated Business Formation
summary: In early April 2026, LegalZoom and GoDaddy announced a partnership making LegalZoom the exclusive legal services provider within GoDaddy’s ecosystem, giving small business customers integrated access to LLC formation, compliance support and attorney guidance as they secure domains and build websites. This move meaningfully broadens GoDaddy’s role from website and domain provider to a more comprehensive launch platform for new businesses, potentially deepening customer engagement and reliance...
